Auth.loginDescription: Use your account to continue into the interview prep workspace.
Auth.registerDescription: Secure credentials auth is enabled with Prisma-backed user storage.

Nav.sidebarTitle: Interview momentum, all in one place.

Marketing.title: Turn job search chaos into a focused interview prep system.
Marketing.description: AI Interview Prep Platform combines application tracking, resume-aware question generation, mock interview practice, and job-specific notes in one monolithic Next.js app.
Marketing.pillar1: Track every application with a recruiter-ready Kanban workflow.
Marketing.pillar2: Generate targeted interview questions from your resume and job description.
Marketing.pillar3: Practice mock interviews and collect AI feedback with saved notes.

Applications.title: Manage every role from wishlist to offer.
Applications.description: Search, filter, create, and update applications in one place.
Applications.empty: No applications yet. Create your first application using the form above to start tracking your job search.
Applications.emptyFiltered: No applications match the current filters yet. Try clearing filters or creating a new application.

QuestionBank.label: Question bank
QuestionBank.title: Browse saved and AI-generated practice prompts.
QuestionBank.description: Review your generated question batches by application, category, difficulty, and type.
QuestionBank.showingAll: Showing all available question sets for this account.
QuestionBank.noApplications: No applications yet. Create an application and add a job description before generating question sets.
QuestionBank.empty: No question sets yet. Generate one from an application detail page once you have an application and job description ready.
QuestionBank.emptyFiltered: No question sets match the current filters. Try clearing one of the filters or generate a new set from an application detail page.

Mock.label: Mock interviews
Mock.title: Practice against your saved question sets.
Mock.description: Start a session from the Question Bank, then come back here to revisit saved answers and continue active practice sessions.
Mock.noSessions: No mock sessions yet. Start one from a question set in the Question Bank after generating questions for an application.
Mock.savedHint: Saved already. You can update this answer any time.
Mock.draftHint: Draft an answer and save your progress.
Mock.completionDescription: You can still revisit any answer and refine it before your next practice round.
Mock.sessionDescription: Save answers question by question. This MVP keeps the flow simple and focused on persistence rather than scoring.
Mock.noQuestions: This session does not have any questions yet.
Mock.questionWorkHint: Work through the questions below and save answers as you go. Use the quick navigation to jump between questions.

Dashboard.label: Dashboard
Dashboard.title: Stay interview-ready across every application.
Dashboard.description: This MVP dashboard surfaces your application momentum, practice activity, and AI-generated prep materials in one place.
Dashboard.noApplications: No applications yet. Create your first one from the tracker page.
Dashboard.noMockSessions: No mock sessions yet. Session activity will appear here once interviews are created.

ApplicationDetail.jobDescriptionReady: Saved and ready for future AI flows
ApplicationDetail.generateTitle: Generate a fresh interview question set
ApplicationDetail.generateDescription: Create behavioral, technical, and resume-based questions for this specific application.
ApplicationDetail.resumeOptionalHint: No resume linked yet. We can still generate a solid starter set.
ApplicationDetail.jobDescriptionRequired: Add a job description before generating questions so the set can be tailored to the role.
ApplicationDetail.jobDescriptionTitle: Store the role description in a dedicated record
ApplicationDetail.jobDescriptionDescription: Keep the original job posting here so future question generation and prep workflows can use a clean, application-specific source.
ApplicationDetail.summaryPending: Summary will appear here as this record evolves.
ApplicationDetail.prepNoteDescription: Save research, answer drafts, and interview strategy notes tied directly to this role.
ApplicationDetail.savedPrepNotesDescription: Update your notes as you learn more about the company, recruiter, and interview loop.
ApplicationDetail.noMockSessions: No mock sessions for this application yet. Start one from a question set after generating questions.
ApplicationDetail.noPrepNotes: No prep notes yet. Add your first job-specific note from the form on the left.

Validation.jobUrlInvalid: Job post URL must be a valid URL.
Validation.jobDescriptionTooShort: Job description must be at least 20 characters.
Validation.jobDescriptionUnavailable: Unable to save job description. Please reopen the application and try again.
Validation.selectApplicationGenerate: Select an application before generating questions.
Validation.selectQuestionSet: Select a question set before starting a mock session.
Validation.reloadSession: Unable to save answer, please reload the session and try again.
Validation.questionSaveUnavailable: Unable to save answer for this question, please try again.
Validation.registerPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

Messages.unableSaveNote: Unable to save note. Please try again.
Messages.questionSetFallback: Generated a starter question set. Add OPENAI_API_KEY for AI-tailored results.
Messages.questionSetEmpty: This question set does not contain any questions yet.
Messages.questionMissingForSession: Question not found for this session.
Messages.questionGenerationRequiresJobDescription: Add a job description before generating questions.
Messages.accountExists: An account with that email already exists.
Messages.unableGenerateQuestions: Unable to generate questions right now. Please try again.
Messages.unableStartMock: Unable to start mock session. Please try again.
Messages.unableSaveAnswer: Unable to save answer, please try again.
Messages.unableCreateApplication: Unable to create application. Please review the form and try again.
Messages.unableUpdateApplication: Unable to update this application. Please try again.
Messages.unableUpdateNote: Unable to update this note. Please try again.
